subcodes.first_line: O true friends! Correspondence and communication are of two kinds: one through the medium of written pages, and the other [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان حقیقی مکاتبات و مخابرات بدو نوعست قسمی بواسطه اوراق و نوع دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @justice and mercy, @war and peace, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @spiritual transformation, @unity; oneness of humanity
